title: Automating conected item status based on the combined status of linked items

posts.author: lionlitvin (lion litvin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m working with two connected boards: a main board and a secondary board with multiple linked items.
I want the status of the main item to update automatically based on the statuses of all its linked items.
Specifically:

  • If at least one linked item has a certain status → the main item should reflect that.
  • If all linked items have a different status → the main item should update accordingly.

For example, imagine a board of library members and a board of books.
If a member has at least one borrowed book, their status should be “Borrowing”.
If all books have been returned, their status should change to “Not Borrowing”.

After consulting with a member of the advanced support team, I was told that — as far as they know — this kind of logic is currently not possible using only Monday.com’s built-in features.
They recommended reaching out to you for further advice or potential workarounds.

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @lionlitvin

We can possibly make that happen with the Connected Boards Automations app. Would you like to give it a try? Feel free to contact us anytime to further discuss the use case and our solution.
